basic_details.job_title: NHSRCL Recruitment 2026 – 15 Posts in IT, Safety, Data Analytics & Cloud | Vacancy Notice 08–20/2026
basic_details.short_information: National High Speed Rail Corporation Limited (NHSRCL) has released Vacancy Notices 08/2026 to 20/2026 inviting applications from Regular/Contractual Officers and Managers working in CPSEs, SPVs, Metro Railways, Ministry of Railways, and Government Departments for 15 posts across IT, Safety, Data Analytics, Cloud Infrastructure, and AFC Systems domains on an Absorption Basis. Posts range from Assistant Manager (E-2) to AGM/JGM (E-6/E-7). Eligibility criteria are reckoned as on 31 May 2026. Candidates can apply for any one post only from Vacancy Notice No. 08/2026 to 20/2026.

application_fee.general_fee: Rs. 400/- (non-refundable, exclusive of transaction processing charges)
application_fee.details: NHSRCL has prescribed a non-refundable application fee for UR, EWS, and OBC candidates. SC, ST, and Women candidates are fully exempted from the fee. The fee must be paid before submitting the application, and candidates are advised to verify their eligibility and the closing date before paying since the fee will not be refunded under any circumstances. | Transaction processing charges over and above Rs. 400/- are also non-refundable. Candidates must note that only one application can be submitted across all vacancy notices 08/2026 to 20/2026 — applying for more than one post is not permitted.

post_wise_qualification.post_name: DGM (IT), Senior Manager (IT), Senior Manager (Data Analytics), Senior Manager (Cloud Infrastructure), Assistant Manager (IT)
post_wise_qualification.essential_qualification: BE/B.Tech in Computer Science, Information Technology, or Electronics from a recognized university/institute approved by AICTE/UGC
post_wise_qualification.desirable: ME/M.Tech in IT, Computer Science, Data Science, AI, Cyber Security, or Software Systems from AICTE/UGC approved institute

post_wise_qualification.essential_qualification: BE/B.Tech in Computer Science, Information Technology, ECE, or EEE from a recognized university/institute approved by AICTE/UGC
post_wise_qualification.desirable: ME/M.Tech in IT, Computer Science, Data Science, AI, Cyber Security, Software Systems, ECE, or EEE from AICTE/UGC approved institute

post_wise_qualification.post_name: AGM/JGM (Safety Operations), AGM/JGM (Safety Maintenance), AM (Safety Operations)
post_wise_qualification.essential_qualification: BE/B.Tech in any discipline (preferably Civil/Electrical/Mechanical or relevant field) from any recognized university/institute
BE/B.Tech in Civil Engineering from any recognized university/institute
BE/B.Tech in Electrical / Electrical & Electronics from a Government-recognized university/institute
BE/B.Tech in Electronics & Communication / Electronics / Electronics & Electrical Engineering or equivalent from a Government-recognized university/institute
BE/B.Tech in Electronics & Communication / Electronics / Electrical & Electronics / Mechanical Engineering or equivalent from any recognized university/institute

qualification.details: Eligibility is reckoned as on 31 May 2026. NHSRCL has defined separate criteria for employees working in IDA pay scales (CPSEs/SPVs/Metro Railways) and CDA pay scales (Ministry of Railways/other Government Departments). Experience from Teaching, Faculty, Apprenticeship, Internship, Proprietorship, Partnership, or Freelancing will not be counted towards the required years of experience. | Candidates wondering about MACP grade pay should note that higher grade pays granted under MACP by departments will not be taken into account for eligibility. Only the substantive grade will be considered for deciding the grade of absorption. Employees in IDA pay scales who do not meet the IDA-specific eligibility criteria may still be considered if they meet the CDA criteria applicable during their employment. | DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

salary_details.details: NHSRCL offers IDA-pattern pay scales for all posts. The approximate annual CTC figures given in the notification are as follows. Selected candidates will be on probation for one year from the date of joining on absorption. | The CTC figures are approximate. Medical standards applicable to all these posts are Executive/Technical: distant vision 6/96/9 or 6/66/12 with or without glasses, near vision JIJII, and normal colour, binocular, field, and night vision. Lasik surgery and radial keratotomy are not permitted.

selection_process: NHSRCL will use a multi-stage selection process for all posts under Vacancy Notices 08/2026 to 20/2026. The Computer Based Test (CBT) for all posts from 08/2026 to 20/2026 may be conducted on the same day and at the same time
which is an important reason why candidates can apply for only one post.
Computer Based Test (CBT) Interview Medical Examination

Management reserves the right to include or dispense with any of these selection stages as deemed fit. Submission of an application does not entitle a candidate to be called for any stage of the selection process. Depending on the volume of applications received

NHSRCL may raise or relax eligibility criteria or prescribe additional written tests. The management's decision regarding selection is final. Outstation candidates called for interview will be paid travelling allowance as per company rules.
how_to_apply: Applications for NHSRCL Vacancy Notices 08/2026 to 20/2026 must be submitted online as per the "Guidelines to Apply" published on the official NHSRCL website. Incomplete applications or applications without supporting documents will be rejected without any correspondence. The following steps outline the application process.
Visit the official NHSRCL website and refer to the "Guidelines to Apply" document for the complete online application procedure.
Register and fill in the application form in the prescribed format only.
Pay the application fee of Rs. 400/- if you belong to UR, EWS, or OBC category (SC/ST/Women are exempted). Note that transaction processing charges are additional and also non-refundable.
Upload all supporting documents as required by the application portal. Applications without supporting documents will be summarily rejected.
Submit only one application across all vacancy notices 08/2026 to 20/2026. Multiple submissions are not permitted.
Note your registration number and monitor your registered email (including spam folder) and the official NHSRCL website regularly for updates.

NHSRCL will not be responsible for any postal delay, wrong delivery, or non-delivery of communication at any stage. All official communication will be sent to the candidate's registered email address only.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download NHSRCL Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. How many posts has NHSRCL notified under Vacancy Notices 08/2026 to 20/2026?
faq.answer: NHSRCL has notified a total of 15 posts across IT, AFC Systems, Data Analytics, Cloud Infrastructure, and Safety (Operations and Maintenance) domains under Vacancy Notices 08/2026 to 20/2026.

faq.question: Q2. Who is eligible to apply for NHSRCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Only Regular or Contractual Officers and Managers currently working in Central Public Sector Undertakings (CPSEs), SPVs, Metro Railways, Ministry of Railways, or other Government Departments are eligible. Eligibility is reckoned as on 31 May 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for NHSRCL Vacancy Notice 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates belonging to UR, EWS, and OBC categories must pay a non-refundable fee of Rs. 400/- (exclusive of transaction processing charges). SC, ST, and Women candidates are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q4. Can I apply for more than one post under NHSRCL Vacancy Notices 08/2026 to 20/2026?
faq.answer: No. Candidates can apply for only one post across all Vacancy Notices 08/2026 to 20/2026. Only one application can be submitted against these vacancy notices. The CBT for all these posts may be conducted on the same day and time.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for NHSRCL DGM (IT) and DGM (AFC Systems)?
faq.answer: Both DGM posts are in E-5 grade with a pay scale of Rs. 80,000–2,20,000 (IDA) and an approximate annual CTC of Rs. 38.00 Lakhs.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for Safety posts in NHSRCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: For AGM/JGM (Safety – Operations and Maintenance) posts, the maximum age limit is 52 years. For Assistant Manager Safety posts (Civil & Track, Electrical, Signalling & Telecom, Rolling Stock, and Operations), the maximum age limit is 45 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for NHSRCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process consists of three stages: Computer Based Test (CBT), followed by an Interview, and finally a Medical Examination. Management may include or dispense with any of these stages as deemed appropriate.

faq.question: Q8. What is the surety bond amount for NHSRCL selected candidates?
faq.answer: The surety bond on joining is Rs. 3,00,000 for E-2 grade, Rs. 4,00,000 for E-4, E-5, and E-6 grades, and Rs. 5,00,000 for E-7 grade. Candidates must serve a minimum of 3 years and give 90 days' notice before resignation.

faq.question: Q9. What experience is NOT counted towards eligibility in NHSRCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Experience in Teaching, Faculty roles, Apprenticeship, Internship, Proprietorship, Partnership, and Freelancing will not be considered as part of the required years of post-qualification experience.

faq.question: Q10. Will MACP grade pay be considered for NHSRCL absorption eligibility?
faq.answer: No. For employees in CDA pay scales, higher grade pays granted under MACP will not be taken into account. Only the substantive grade will be considered for deciding the grade of absorption into NHSRCL.

faq.question: How many posts has NHSRCL notified under Vacancy Notices 08/2026 to 20/2026?
faq.answer: NHSRCL has notified a total of 15 posts across IT, AFC Systems, Data Analytics, Cloud Infrastructure, and Safety (Operations and Maintenance) domains under Vacancy Notices 08/2026 to 20/2026.

title: NHSRCL Recruitment 2026 – 15 Posts in IT, Safety, Data Analytics & Cloud | Vacancy Notice 08–20/2026
